hooks.name: pre-task
hooks.description: Read shared context before starting any task
hooks.instruction: Review CONTEXT.md for existing components, services, types, endpoints, and decisions. Use this knowledge to avoid duplication and maintain consistency.

hooks.name: post-task
hooks.description: Update shared context after completing a task
hooks.instruction: Append a new entry to the Session Log section of CONTEXT.md with: date, task summary, components created/modified, services used, types added, decisions made.

hooks.name: pre-commit-lint
hooks.description: Run TypeScript check and lint before committing
hooks.command: cd Runnatics.Ui && npx tsc --noEmit && npx eslint src/ --ext .ts,.tsx --max-warnings 0
hooks.message: Fix TypeScript or ESLint errors before committing.

hooks.name: validate-no-any
hooks.message: TypeScript strict mode: 'any' type detected. Replace with a proper interface or type.

hooks.name: validate-no-direct-axios
hooks.description: Ensure API calls only go through the service layer
hooks.message: API calls must go through src/main/src/services/ — never directly in components. Use the appropriate Service class.

hooks.name: validate-no-numeric-ids
hooks.description: Catch numeric ID types in interfaces
hooks.message: All IDs from the API are encrypted strings. Use 'string' type, not 'number'.

hooks.name: session-start
hooks.instruction: Run session initialization: check dev server, TypeScript health, and load context.
